# Bit-for-bit reproduction of the environment used to produce the paper's results.
# Generated by `pip freeze` from a clean Python 3.12 conda env on Linux + CUDA 12.4.
# For typical use, `pip install -r requirements.txt` is sufficient and resolves
# transitive deps automatically. Use this lock file only when you need an exact
# match (e.g. a transitive package was yanked or shipped a breaking patch).
#
# Note: verl is NOT installed via pip — this repository ships a modified verl tree
# under ./verl/ (forked from upstream commit 0eb50ec4, v0.7.0.dev). Run training
# scripts from the project root so Python imports the local modified verl package.
